_meta.description: Annual operating schedule with recurrence patterns - single source of truth for hours, seasons, closures, pricing
_meta.staffInstructions: This file controls WHEN Rocky Mount is open or closed. The website uses this to show real-time status (Open Now, Closed, etc). Update this file to add closures (staff training days, weather closures, etc.) or change season dates. IMPORTANT: Prices in this file should match prices in siteInfo.json.

_aiRules.description: CRITICAL: This file controls the Open/Closed status shown on the website
_aiRules.severity: HIGH - mistakes here affect every page on the site
beforeEditing: NEVER change operatingDays or closedDays without explicit permission
NEVER modify standard hours without site director approval
prohibited: Do NOT change operatingDays without site director approval
Do NOT modify hours.standard without approval
Do NOT set season dates outside March-December

crossFileSync.events.json: Events must fall within seasonalWindow dates

datePatterns.firstWeekMarch: First Wednesday in March (or first operating day)

_aiRules.whenUnsure: This file is critical - always ask user to verify changes

fieldGuide.currentYear: The calendar year this schedule applies to. Update to new year each January.
fieldGuide.operatingDays: Days of the week we're open. Rocky Mount is Wed-Sat. Don't change without major operational change.
fieldGuide.closedDays: Days of the week we're always closed. Sun-Mon-Tue. Don't change without major operational change.
fieldGuide.hours: Opening and closing times. 24-hour format (17:00) used by code, 12-hour (5:00 PM) for display.
fieldGuide.seasonalWindow: When our season starts and ends. Update dates each January.
fieldGuide.closures.annual: Recurring closures that happen every year (like Thanksgiving). Dates auto-calculate from patterns.
fieldGuide.closures.oneOff: One-time closures for this year only (staff training, weather, etc.). Add entries here.
fieldGuide.pricingSchedule: Admission prices by age category. UPDATE BOTH HERE AND IN siteInfo.json when prices change.

everyJanuary: currentYear - change to the new year
seasonalWindow.startDate - calculate first operating day in March
closures.annual[thanksgiving].startDate and endDate - calculate new dates
asNeeded: closures.oneOff - add staff training days, weather closures, etc.
pricingSchedule.tiers.priceUSD - when admission prices change (ALSO update siteInfo.json)
rarely: operatingDays / closedDays (only if we change which days we're open)

rules: Dates must be in YYYY-MM-DD format (example: 2026-11-26)
Prices are numbers only, no dollar signs (12 not '$12')
Every closure needs a unique 'id' field
Times use 24-hour format for code (17:00) and 12-hour for display (5:00 PM)
The season ALWAYS ends December 20th regardless of what day that falls on
Thanksgiving closure is always 4th Thursday of November + the Friday after
commonMistakes: WRONG: Changing prices here but not in siteInfo.json - BOTH files must match
WRONG: Adding a closure without an 'id' field - Every closure needs a unique id
WRONG: Using 5:00 PM in closeTime24 - Use 17:00 for 24-hour fields
WRONG: Adding a closure that overlaps with another - Check existing closures first
WRONG: Forgetting to update the Thanksgiving dates for the new year

_annualChecklist.description: Complete these steps in January each year to prepare the new season
_annualChecklist.timing: Do this the first week of January

steps.howTo: Find the first Wednesday in March. That's your start date.
steps.example: For 2027: March 3rd is a Wednesday, so use '2027-03-03'

steps.howTo: Always December 20th of the current year
Find the 4th Thursday in November. That's Thanksgiving. The day after is Friday.
steps.example: For 2027: Nov 25 (Thu) and Nov 26 (Fri), so startDate: '2027-11-25', endDate: '2027-11-26'

steps.howTo: Change all validFrom to January 1 of new year, validUntil to December 31

steps.task: Clear one-off closures from last year
steps.howTo: Delete any entries in closures.oneOff that were for the previous year
Set _meta.nextReviewDate and pricingSchedule.nextReviewDate to January 1 of NEXT year

_closureTemplates.description: Copy-paste these templates to add new closures. Replace the values in CAPS.
_closureTemplates.howToUse: Copy the template you need, paste it into the appropriate array (annual or oneOff), and fill in the CAPS values.

staffTrainingDay._instructions: For a single-day staff training closure. Add to closures.oneOff array.

template.name: Staff Professional Development Day
template.note: Site closed for internal staff use

example.name: Staff Professional Development Day
example.note: Site closed for internal staff use

weatherClosure._instructions: For emergency weather closures. Add to closures.oneOff array.

template.name: Weather Closure
template.note: Site closed due to hazardous conditions

example.name: Weather Closure
example.note: Site closed due to hazardous conditions

specialEventClosure._instructions: When the site is closed for a private event. Add to closures.oneOff array.

multiDayClosure._instructions: For closures spanning multiple days. Add to closures.oneOff array.

_thanksgivingExplained.meaning: Rocky Mount closes on Thanksgiving Day (4th Thursday of November) and the day after (Friday)
howToCalculate: 2. Count forward to find the first Thursday
3. Add 21 days (3 weeks) to get the 4th Thursday - that's Thanksgiving
4. The next day (Friday) is also closed
6. Update endDate to the Friday after
_thanksgivingExplained.note: The website code can auto-calculate this, but we store explicit dates as a backup and for clarity

patterns.first-week-march: Season starts on the first Wednesday (or first operating day) in March
patterns.first-wednesday-march: Same as above - the first Wednesday of March
patterns.december-20: Season always ends December 20th, regardless of what day of the week it falls on
patterns.second-wednesday-december: Alternative pattern - season ends on the 2nd Wednesday of December (older pattern, not currently used)
patterns.fourth-thursday-november-plus-friday: Thanksgiving closure - 4th Thursday of November plus the Friday after

_yearAgnosticPatternsExplained.whyWeUsePatterns: Patterns help us remember the RULE, while the actual dates are calculated each year. The pattern stays the same; only the dates change.

hours.note: Hours may vary for special events. See closures array for exceptions.

nextYearTemplate.instructions: Season: First week of March through December 20 (every year)
nextYearTemplate.endNote: Always December 20th regardless of day of week

annual.name: Thanksgiving Holiday
annual.note: Closed Thursday and Friday only (Thanksgiving Day + day after)

closures._note: Season ends December 20th, so no separate Christmas closure needed

oneOff.name: Staff Professional Development Day
oneOff.note: Site closed for internal staff use

pricingSchedule._note: IMPORTANT: When changing prices, also update data/siteInfo.json admission section to match
pricingSchedule.note: Prices locked through end of 2026 season

futureYears.notes: Template ready - calculate dates in January 2027
Template ready - calculate dates in January 2028
